message:
fix(mouse): correct viewport calculation in handleResize

The viewport aspect ratio wasn't matching the terminal content area,
causing mouse clicks to be misaligned when Kitty stretches the image.

Fix handleResize to match cli.zig logic:
- Use actual toolbar pixel height instead of just 1 row
- Apply DPR scaling for HiDPI displays
- Calculate available_height by subtracting toolbar_height from terminal height

This ensures the browser viewport aspect ratio matches what Kitty displays,
so coordinate mapping works correctly.
